attribution.changes: Statements formalized (translated) into Lean 4 by parZer; proofs are conditional on the disclosed sorry-stubs.
attribution.title: Near-sunflowers and focal families

license.label: cc-by — full Lean file available under commission

nodes.label: IsNearSunflower
nodes.lean:
def IsNearSunflower (n r : ℕ) (H : Finset (Finset (Fin n))) : Prop :=
  H.card = r ∧ ∀ i : Fin n,
    (H.filter (fun A => i ∈ A)).card = 0 ∨ (H.filter (fun A => i ∈ A)).card = 1 ∨
    (H.filter (fun A => i ∈ A)).card = r - 1 ∨ (H.filter (fun A => i ∈ A)).card = r

nodes.label: IsFocalFamily
IsBFocalFamily
HasFocal
nodes.lean:
def HasFocal (n r : ℕ) (F : Finset (Finset (Fin n))) : Prop :=
  ∃ x0 : Finset (Fin n), ∃ H : Finset (Finset (Fin n)), H ⊆ F ∧ IsFocalFamily n r x0 H

nodes.label: HasNearSunflower
nodes.lean:
def HasNearSunflower (n r : ℕ) (F : Finset (Finset (Fin n))) : Prop :=
  ∃ H : Finset (Finset (Fin n)), H ⊆ F ∧ IsNearSunflower n r H

nodes.label: HasBFocal
nodes.lean:
def HasBFocal (n r : ℕ) (b : Bool) (F : Finset (Finset (Fin n))) : Prop :=
  ∃ x0 : Finset (Fin n), ∃ H : Finset (Finset (Fin n)), H ⊆ F ∧ IsBFocalFamily n r b x0 H

nodes.label: lem_mrrw_lp_bound
nodes.lean: theorem lem_mrrw_lp_bound : ∀ (δ : ℝ), 0 < δ → δ < 1 → ∀ (ε : ℝ), 0 < ε → ∃ n0 : ℕ, ∀ n : ℕ, n0 ≤ n → ∀ F : Finset (Finset (Fin n)), (∀ A ∈ F, ∀ B ∈ F, A ≠ B → δ * (n : ℝ) < ((symmDiff A B).card : ℝ)) → (F.card : ℝ) ≤ (2 : ℝ) ^ ((Real.logb 2 (1/2 - Real.sqrt (δ * (1 - δ))) + ε) * (n : ℝ)) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_thm_main
nodes.lean: theorem thm_thm_main : ∀ r : ℕ, 3 ≤ r → ((∀ n : ℕ, ∀ F : Finset (Finset (Fin n)), (r - 1) * 2 ^ (Nat.ceil ((((r - 2) * n : ℕ) : ℚ) / (((r - 1 : ℕ)) : ℚ))) < F.card → HasFocal n r F) ∧ (∀ n : ℕ, ∀ F : Finset (Finset (Fin n)), ¬ HasNearSunflower n r F → ¬ HasFocal n r F) ∧ (∃ cns : ℝ, 0 < cns ∧ ∀ n : ℕ, ∃ F : Finset (Finset (Fin n)), ¬ HasNearSunflower n r F ∧ cns * (2 / Real.rpow ((r : ℝ) + 1) (1 / ((r : ℝ) - 1))) ^ n ≤ (F.card : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ cff : ℝ, 0 < cff ∧ ∀ n : ℕ, ∃ F : Finset (Finset (Fin n)), ¬ HasFocal n r F ∧ cff * (2 / Real.rpow (r : ℝ) (1 / ((r : ℝ) - 1))) ^ n ≤ (F.card : ℝ))) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_thm_3diff
nodes.lean: theorem thm_thm_3diff : ∃ n0 : ℕ, ∀ n : ℕ, n0 ≤ n → ∀ F : Finset (Finset (Fin n)), (2 : ℝ) ^ (0.44 * (n : ℝ)) ≤ (F.card : ℝ) → ∃ A ∈ F, ∃ B ∈ F, ∃ C ∈ F, ∃ D ∈ F, ∃ E ∈ F, ∃ G ∈ F, A ≠ B ∧ C ≠ D ∧ E ≠ G ∧ Disjoint (symmDiff A B) (symmDiff C D) ∧ Disjoint (symmDiff A B) (symmDiff E G) ∧ Disjoint (symmDiff C D) (symmDiff E G) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_cor_linear
nodes.lean: theorem thm_cor_linear : ∃ n0 : ℕ, ∀ n : ℕ, n0 ≤ n → ∀ F : Finset (Finset (Fin n)), (∅ : Finset (Fin n)) ∈ F → (∀ A ∈ F, ∀ B ∈ F, symmDiff A B ∈ F) → (2 : ℝ) ^ (0.44 * (n : ℝ)) ≤ (F.card : ℝ) → HasFocal n 4 F := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_thm_1_sided
nodes.lean: theorem thm_thm_1_sided : ∀ n k r : ℕ, 3 ≤ r → k ≤ n → ∀ F : Finset (Finset (Fin n)), (∀ A ∈ F, A.card = k) → ¬ HasBFocal n r true F → (F.card : ℚ) ≤ ((r : ℚ) - 1) * (Nat.choose n (Nat.ceil ((((r - 2) * k : ℕ) : ℚ) / (((r - 1 : ℕ)) : ℚ))) : ℚ) / (Nat.choose k (Nat.ceil ((((r - 2) * k : ℕ) : ℚ) / (((r - 1 : ℕ)) : ℚ))) : ℚ) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_cor_one_sided
nodes.lean: theorem thm_cor_one_sided : ∀ n r : ℕ, 3 ≤ r → ∀ b : Bool, ∀ F : Finset (Finset (Fin n)), ¬ HasBFocal n r b F → (F.card : ℚ) ≤ ((r : ℚ) - 1) * ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose n (Nat.ceil ((((r - 2) * k : ℕ) : ℚ) / (((r - 1 : ℕ)) : ℚ))) : ℚ) / (Nat.choose k (Nat.ceil ((((r - 2) * k : ℕ) : ℚ) / (((r - 1 : ℕ)) : ℚ))) : ℚ) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_con_k
nodes.lean: theorem thm_con_k : ∀ r : ℕ, 4 ≤ r → ∃ C : ℝ, 0 < C ∧ ∀ n k : ℕ, ∀ F : Finset (Finset (Fin n)), (∀ A ∈ F, A.card = k) → ¬ HasNearSunflower n r F → (F.card : ℝ) ≤ Real.rpow C (k : ℝ) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_thm_k
nodes.lean: theorem thm_thm_k : ∃ k0 : ℕ, ∀ n k : ℕ, k0 ≤ k → ∀ F : Finset (Finset (Fin n)), (∀ A ∈ F, A.card = k) → (∀ A ∈ F, ∀ B ∈ F, ∀ C ∈ F, ∀ D ∈ F, A ≠ B → A ≠ C → A ≠ D → B ≠ C → B ≠ D → C ≠ D → ¬ Disjoint (symmDiff A B) (symmDiff C D)) → (F.card : ℝ) ≤ Real.rpow 2.148 (k : ℝ) := by sorry
